rationale: Tax Code §11.15 governs exemption of family supplies for home or farm use, which is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b). No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: A family is entitled to an exemption from taxation of its family supplies for home or farm use.
_note: Rule text pertains to §11.15 (family supplies), not §11.13(b) (homestead exemption). No conflict identified.
